name: SaaS with Payments
input: I want a SaaS where users can subscribe to monthly plans, connect their Stripe account, and manage billing.
mock_answers: Three tiers: free, pro ($29/mo), and enterprise ($99/mo). Free tier gets 3 projects, pro gets unlimited, enterprise gets team features. Yes, users should be able to upgrade/downgrade anytime. Credit card only for now. Send email receipts after each charge.
